# Express Postgres API

[![build](https://img.shields.io/badge/build-passing-green)](https://example.com)

A small Express + PostgreSQL API used as a RepoLens test fixture.

## Installation

```bash
npm install
```

## Usage

Start the dev server with `npm run dev`. See [the docs](https://example.com)
for more, and check out the [API reference](https://example.com/api).

## Testing

```bash
npm test
```
